pin_definitions.description: Input voltage; connect a 0.1 µF or greater ceramic capacitor from IN to GND as close to the IC as possible.
Ground connection; connect externally to PowerPAD
Enable input, logic low turns on power switch (TPS2552) or logic high turns on power switch (TPS2553)
Active-low open-drain output, asserted during overcurrent, overtemperature, or reverse-voltage conditions.
External resistor used to set current-limit threshold; recommended 15 kΩ ≤ RILIM ≤ 232 kΩ.
Internally connected to GND; used to heat-sink the part to the circuit board traces. Connect PowerPAD to GND pin externally.

logical_pins.name: IN
logical_pins.description: Input voltage; connect a 0.1 µF or greater ceramic capacitor from IN to GND as close to the IC as possible.

logical_pins.name: EN
logical_pins.description: Enable input, logic high turns on power switch (TPS2553) or logic low turns on power switch (TPS2552).

logical_pins.name: FAULT
logical_pins.description: Active-low, open-drain output, asserted during overcurrent or overtemperature conditions.

logical_pins.name: ILIM
logical_pins.description: External resistor used to set current-limit threshold.

logical_pins.name: Power Pad
logical_pins.description: Exposed thermal pad. Internally connected to GND. Connect to GND plane for heat sinking.

5.name: ILIM
5.description: External resistor used to set current-limit threshold.
